title: aws-kms: as_service_error() borrow pattern instead of into_service_error()
description: Why this choice is correct: into_service_error() consumed the SdkError and panicked if the error was not a service error (e.g. network timeout, credential error). as_service_error() borrows the error so non-service errors fall through to SecretError::Unavailable. The tradeoff is that we lose the structured error type and use format!("{svc}") instead, but that is unavoidable since we only have a borrow. A future contributor might suggest reverting to into_service_error() to get a typed error — that would restore the panic-on-network-failure bug.
